◎简　　介  

　　Buckjumping takes the pulse of present day New Orleans by turning to its dancers, the men and women who embody the rhythm of the city and prove it on the streets every chance they get.This 70 minute documentary film follows six different New Orleans communities as they exalt in their distinct form of dance.
